nodes.itemHTML: • ntlstars872 - Interactive cli menu to list and run npm scripts.
• Home Assistant has a MQTT component.
• EmberCamp Module Unification Update
• cli-error-notifierstars64 - Send native desktop notifications when npm scripts fail.
• madhatted.com
• Helpers and tips for npm run scripts - Blog post by Michael Kühnel covering advanced topics.
• MQTT-Cstars540 - A portable MQTT C client for embedded systems and PCs alike.

• msp430g2553 Peripheral access API for MSP430G2553 microcontrollers (generated using svd2rust)
    • msp430 quickstartstars18 some examples for msp430

• xargostars982 Rust package manager with support for non-default std libraries — build rust runtime for your own embedded system.
    • xargo is great but it's in maintenance mode, cargo-xbuildstars238 is catching up as intended replacement.
• svd2ruststars493 Generate Rust structs with register mappings from SVD files.
• cortex-m semihostingstars0 Semihosting for ARM Cortex-M processors
• BabeLua - Lua editor/debugger extension for VS2012-13 with highlighting, auto-completion, linting, and formatting capabilities.
• balinterdi.com - Balint Erdi blog.
• BOTTOS AI - A decentralized AI data sharing network that uses a consensus-based application platform to allow AI projects to gather training data.
• AvalonStudiostars1.4k - An extensible, cross platform IDE written in C# for Embedded C/C++, .NET Core, Avalonia and Typescript
• How To Use OpenCV In React Native For Image Processing
• saystars28 - Simple string key-value store for i18n.
• LÖVR - 3D framework for creating virtual reality experiences, inspired by LÖVE 2D.
• lua-logstars96 - Asynchronous logging library with pluggable writers for file system, network, ZeroMQ, and more.
• LuaFileSystem - Extends and complements Lua's built-in set of file system functions.
• lua-pathstars57 - File system path manipulation library.
• LuaLoggingstars145 - Log4j-inspired logging library supporting various appenders.
• luasyslog - Log to syslog, based on LuaLogging.
• lunix - Bindings to common Unix system APIs, striving for thread-safety.

• MessagePack
    • lua-MessagePack - Pure Lua implementation of MessagePack.
    • lua-cmsgpackstars330 - A MessagePack C implementation with Lua bindings, as used by Redis.=
• lua-pbstars278 - Protocol Buffers implementation.
• lua-zmqstars149 - Lua bindings to ZeroMQ.
• lzmqstars128 - A newer Lua binding to ZeroMQ.
• lua-resty-kafkastars738 - Kafka client driver based on OpenResty cosockets.
• lua-resty-rabbitmqstompstars186 - RabbitMQ client library based on OpenResty cosockets.
• jvm-profilerstars1.7k - Java Agent to collect various metrics and stacktraces for Hadoop/Spark JVM processes in a distributed way.
• Fengari - The Lua VM rewritten in Javascript with seamless JS and DOM interoperability.
• LuaBridgestars1.4k - A lightweight library for mapping data, functions, and classes back and forth between C++ and Lua.
• lua-parserstars162 - A Lua 5.3 parser written using LPegLabel, with improved error messages.

• Conferences/Meetups
    • Lua Workshop - Annual 2-day meeting of the Lua community, in rotating locations.
    • Lua Conf - Annual 1-day Lua conference in Brazil.
    • FOSDEM - Annual 2-day gathering of F/OSS developers in Brussels which sometimes has a "Lua devroom".
• lua-users.org - A site for and by users of Lua, featuring an IRC channel, a web archive of lua-l, and a large wiki.
• lua-l - The official Lua mailing list, and one of the focal points of the Lua community.
• Lua.Space - The Lua community blog.
• Lua Users Foundation - An association of individuals with the mission of supporting and promoting Lua and its community and ecosystems.
• compat53 - Compatibility module providing Lua-5.3-style APIs for Lua 5.2 and 5.1.
• RxLuastars467 - Reactive Extensions, Observables, etc.
• luaosslstars123 - "Most comprehensive OpenSSL module in the Lua universe" - used by lapis, kong, and lua-http.
• lua-httpstars668 - Asynchronous HTTP and WebSocket library with client and server APIs, TLS, and HTTP/2; based on cqueues.
• pgmoonstars321 - Lua PostgreSQL driver for OpenResty, LuaSocket, and cqueues.
• luatxstars106 - Time, date, and timezone library.

• Redis
    • redis-luastars704 - Pure Lua client library for Redis.
    • lua-resty-redisstars1.8k - Lua Redis client driver for OpenResty.
    • lredisstars43 - Asynchronous Redis client with pipelining and Pub/Sub support; based on cqueues.

• LPeg
    • LPeg - A pattern-matching library for Lua, based on Parsing Expression Grammars.
    • lpeg_patternsstars111 - A collection of LPeg patterns.
    • LuLPegstars225 - A pure Lua implementation of LPeg v0.12.
    • LPegLJstars104 - A pure LuaJIT implementation of LPeg v1.0.
    • LPegLabelstars115 - An extension of LPeg adding support for labeled failures.
• LXSHstars71 - A collection of lexers and syntax highlighters written with LPeg.
• Lakestars123 - A build engine written in Lua, similar to Ruby's rake.
• Luabuildstars79 - Highly customizable Lua 5.2 build system.
• luastaticstars661 - Simple tool for turning Lua programs into standalone executables.
• omniastars45 - A batteries-included creator of standalone executables, built on top of luastatic.
• lua-cURLv3stars242 - Lua binding to libcurl.
• lua-modestars292 - Emacs major mode for editing Lua.
• vscode-luastars109 - VSCode intellisense and linting.
• sshuttlestars8.9k - Poor man's VPN.

• Colonystars339 - An unordered "bag"-type container which outperforms std containers in high-modification scenarios while maintaining permanent pointers to non-erased elements regardless of insertion/erasure. [zLib] website
• Polskie
• Nanotimerstars98 - A simple low-overhead cross-platform timer class for benchmarking. [zLib] website
• Timsortstars265 - A templated stable sorting function which outperforms quicksort-based algorithms including std::sort, for reversed or semi-sorted data. [MIT]
• plf::liststars115 - A std::list implementation which removes range splicing in order to enable cache-friendlier structure, yielding significant performance gains. [zLib] website
• plf::stackstars47 - A replacement container for the std::stack container adaptor, with better performance than any std container in a stack context. [zLib] website
